response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience (~13+ years) with solid fundamentals, TDD discipline, and exposure to multiple languages, but lacks the core requirements for this role. There is no recent or substantial C++ experience (only ~6 months at National Instruments in 2014-2015), no Windows platform focus, no SQL Server/Oracle experience, and no capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income domain background. The profile is web/full-stack oriented (Node.js, TypeScript, DLang), which doesn't align with a C++ capital markets consulting engagement.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship fundamentals (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Polyglot background with low-latency systems experience at Dunnhumby
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops and talks
concerns: Minimal C++ experience (~6 months, over 10 years ago)
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
No SQL Server/Oracle or Windows platform development experience

key_factors.factor: No capital markets/fixed income domain knowledge
No SQL Server/Oracle or Windows platform experience
